channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Second fan files lawsuit claiming ownership of Shohei Ohtani's 50-50 baseball
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — The claim to Shohei Ohtani's potentially lucrative 50th home run ball grew more complicated this week, with a second fan filing a lawsuit asserting he had possession of the historic baseball.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NCAA March Madness returning to San Francisco
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- March Madness is returning to San Francisco, to Chase Center, specifically. As previously announced, the venue will host the 2025 NCAA Division I Men's Basketball West Regionals on March 27 and 29 of 2025.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Former Poland goalkeeper Szczesny joins Barcelona after announcing his retirement in August
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Barcelona added former Poland goalkeeper Wojciech Szczesny to its squad on Wednesday to help make up for the absence of the injured Marc-André ter Stegen.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USA Today columnist defends question that led to scolding from WNBA players union
item.description: Following a scathing statement from the WNBPA accusing her of fueling "vitriol," USA Today columnist Christine Brennan defender her interview with Dijonai Carrington.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gov. Newsom extends ‘last call’ until 4 a.m., but only for private club at one sports arena
item.description: Supporters say the bill is designed to benefit the local economy, but opponents fear it could spread up and down the state and jeopardize public safety.
item.dc:creator: Jason Henry, The Mercury News

item.title: Tim Walz says he kept a shotgun in his car to hunt pheasants after football practices
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz opened up about his history with guns during the vice presidential debate on Tuesday, claiming he kept one in his car to hunt pheasants.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aggies face another tough challenge at #21 Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Aggies have had two weeks to stew in that second half collapse at Temple when they got outscored in the second half 28-8 to fall to 1-3 on the season. "Obviously, our record is not what we want," said quarterback Spencer Petras on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball legend Pete Rose dies at 83
item.description: (KRON) -- Baseball legend Pete Rose died Monday at the age of 83. Rose's complicated legacy includes being MLB's all-time hits leader but being banned from the league for gambling on games. He died Monday morning in his Las Vegas home, TMZ said. The outlet did not reveal a cause of death.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: The final day for the Oakland Athletics arrives ahead of next season's move away from the Bay
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — When manager Mark Kotsay removed his Oakland jersey for the final time Sunday, it was bound for the Baseball Hall of Fame. Brent Rooker? His final jersey with the name Oakland across the front will be preserved in a frame and displayed on his wall at home.
item.dc:creator: TIM BOOTH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Broncos def. Jets on the road 10-9
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Week 4 of the NFL season saw the Cincinnati Bengals claim their first victory of the year with a 34-24 win. Wide receiver Ja'Marr Chase showcased his speed and balance, sprinting 63 yards for a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: College GameDay makes first-ever appearance at Berkeley
item.description: (KRON) -- Since taking its show on the road back in 1993, "College GameDay" has been a huge presence in the college football community by being known to travel across dozens of campuses across the country.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Chastain passes Truex on late restart to win NASCAR Cup Series race at Kansas Speedway
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Kan. (AP) — Ross Chastain finally got to smash a watermelon for the first time this season Sunday at Kansas Speedway. Smashed the hopes of a bunch of playoff drivers trying to earn an automatic berth in the next round, too.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres postseason tickets on sale now
item.description: Tickets for 2024 postseason games went on sale to the public on Saturday, with access limited to residents in nearby geographical locations. The Padres still have two games left in the regular season, and fans can watch for free all weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox look to break Tigers' home win streak
item.description: Chicago White Sox (39-121, fifth in the AL Central) vs. Detroit Tigers (86-74, second in the AL Central) Detroit; Saturday, 1:10 p.m. EDT PITCHING PROBABLES: White Sox: Sean Burke (0-0); Tigers: TBD BOTTOM LINE: The Detroit Tigers, on a five-game home winning streak, host the Chicago White Sox.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago Sky fire head coach Teresa Weatherspoon
item.description: The Chicago Sky have fired head coach Teresa Weatherspoon after a disappointing season in which the team went 13-27 and missed the WNBA playoff picture.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Tom Brady helps Big Ten kickoff nationwide blood drive
item.description: The Big Ten and Abbott have launched a nation-wide blood drive competition to tackle the generational shortage of blood, with the university with the most donations receiving one-million dollars, as the U.S. is currently experiencing one of the worst blood shortages in a generation.
item.dc:creator: Dina Bair, WGN 9

item.title: A's beat Rangers 3-2 in Coliseum's last game
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (KRON) -- In their last game at the Oakland Coliseum, the A's beat the Texas Rangers 3-2 on Thursday afternoon. The A's took a 2-0 lead in the third inning and did not relinquish it.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Meet the champions: These are the top stars of WWE NXT on the CW Network
item.description: Who is the future of sports entertainment? To answer that question, one must look to the top tier of NXT, the champions who have overcome the odds and claimed bragging rights over every superstar on the brand.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs' turn the page to Eagles, after disappointing loss to Broncos
item.description: After a disconcerting Saturday afternoon for Tampa Bay, the Bucs turn the page to the Philadelphia Eagles in Week 4.
item.dc:creator: C.H., WFLA, NBC

item.title: Brett Favre says Parkinson's diagnosis came after struggles with his right arm
item.description: Brett Favre revealed Tuesday that he had been diagnosed with Parkinson's disease while speaking to a congressional committee.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
